label: Doorbell (classic two-tone)
caption: A two-tone ding-dong doorbell chime, bright metallic, short ringing decay.

label: Doorbell (buzzer)
caption: A flat electric buzzer at the front door, harsh continuous tone, no melody.

label: Doorbell (smart)
caption: A digital doorbell jingle, synthesized notes, repeating brief melodic phrase.

label: Door knock
caption: Three sharp wooden taps on a door, evenly spaced, low frequency, close range.

label: Door knock (urgent)
caption: Rapid hard knocks on a door, repeating quickly, louder than conversation, near.

label: Fire alarm
caption: A continuous loud building fire alarm horn, low harsh blast, repeating throughout space.

label: Fire alarm (T3 pattern)
caption: Three short alarm blasts followed by a pause, repeating, very loud and shrill.

label: Smoke alarm
caption: A piercing repetitive smoke detector beep, three short shrill beeps then short silence.

label: Carbon monoxide alarm
caption: Four short alarm chirps with a brief pause, then repeats, high pitched, sharp.

label: Oven timer beep
caption: A repeating electronic beep from a kitchen appliance, mid-pitched, short, even spacing.

label: Microwave finished
caption: A short rising sequence of microwave end beeps, mid-pitched, repeating five times.

label: Washing machine finished
caption: A soft melodic jingle from a washing machine, multiple tones, slowly repeating once a minute.

label: Kettle whistle
caption: A high steam whistle rising in pitch from a stovetop kettle, sustained continuous tone.

label: Landline phone ring
caption: An old-style landline phone ringer, harsh metallic bell, two-tone, repeating clearly.

label: Mobile phone ringing
caption: A bright electronic ringtone melody, repeating tune, mid-range, easy to localize indoors.

label: Baby crying
caption: A baby crying loudly, high-pitched wailing voice, irregular gasping pauses, urgent emotional tone.

label: Baby fussing
caption: A baby whimpering and fussing softly, low intermittent vocal noise, not yet crying.

label: Child calling out
caption: A child voice calling out from another room, mid-high pitched, slightly distant, short phrase.

label: Adult calling name
caption: An adult voice calling a person's name from across a room, rising intonation.

label: Adult shouting
caption: An adult voice shouting, raised volume, urgent emotional tone, brief exclamation.

label: Dog barking
caption: A dog barking sharply, repeating mid-pitched bursts, energetic, close to the listener.

label: Dog growling
caption: A dog growling low and continuous, guttural, threatening, no barking yet.

label: Cat meowing
caption: A cat meowing close by, soft rising tone, single repeated vocalization, indoor reverberation.

label: Glass breaking
caption: Sharp glass shatter and falling shards, brief sudden crash, high frequency tinkle aftertail.

label: Dish dropped
caption: A ceramic plate dropping and breaking on a hard floor, sudden crack, short clatter aftertail.

label: Police siren
caption: A modulating police siren wail, repeating up-down sweep, distant outdoors, urban environment.

label: Ambulance siren
caption: An ambulance siren yelping repeatedly, fast pitch oscillation, distant outdoors, slightly approaching.

label: Fire truck siren
caption: A loud fire engine air-horn blast followed by a continuous siren wail, outdoors, approaching.

label: Car horn
caption: A car horn honking briefly, mid-pitched harsh tone, single short blast outdoors.

label: Car horn (long)
caption: A car horn sustained for several seconds, harsh continuous mid-tone, urban traffic background.

label: Alarm test chirp
caption: A single low battery chirp from a smoke detector, brief high-pitched beep, repeating every minute.

label: Water running
caption: Water running from a tap into a sink, continuous splashing texture, indoor bathroom or kitchen.

label: Water boiling
caption: Boiling water bubbling steadily in a pot, soft rolling noise, continuous, kitchen ambience.

label: Shower running
caption: Shower water spraying continuously against tile, broadband hissing, bathroom reverberation, steady.

label: Toilet flushing
caption: A toilet flushing, gushing water rush followed by tank refilling hiss, short event.

label: Door closing
caption: A heavy door closing with a soft thud and latch click, single brief event.

label: Door slamming
caption: A door slamming shut hard, sudden loud impact, brief reverberation, no voice.

label: Footsteps
caption: Footsteps on a hard floor, repeating mid-pitched taps, slow walking pace, indoor reverberation.

label: Footsteps on stairs
caption: Footsteps climbing stairs, repeated heavier impacts at slow regular cadence, indoors.

label: Vacuum cleaner
caption: A vacuum cleaner running, loud continuous broadband hum, machine motor noise indoors.

label: Hair dryer
caption: A hair dryer running, high pitched motor whine and air rush, sustained continuous sound.

label: Blender running
caption: A blender chopping ingredients, harsh mechanical grinding noise, sustained motor, kitchen ambience.

label: Alarm clock
caption: An alarm clock beeping rapidly, mid-pitched insistent electronic tone, repeating without pause.

label: Phone alarm
caption: A phone alarm playing a melodic ringtone, increasing volume, repeating from nearby surface.

label: Alarm silenced
caption: A short tone followed by sudden silence of a smoke alarm, single confirmation chirp.

label: Speech (general)
caption: A person speaking conversationally indoors, calm voice, single speaker, normal volume, no urgency.

label: Speech (urgent)
caption: A person speaking urgently and loudly indoors, raised voice, emotional, single speaker, short phrases.

label: Laughter
caption: People laughing together briefly, multiple voices overlapping, joyful rising cadence, short burst.

label: Coughing
caption: A person coughing in short bursts, mid-low pitched, brief explosive sound, indoor.

label: Sneeze
caption: A loud sudden sneeze, single brief explosive exhalation, mid-high frequency, indoor.

label: Silence
caption: A quiet room with only faint background ambience, no salient foreground sound, very low energy.
